name: Patrick Mahomes
bio: Three-time Super Bowl MVP. The face of the league. Married his high school sweetheart Brittany. Side-arm throw artist. Owns Mr. Pibb shares (probably).
drama: His brother Jackson is a TikTok problem. Brittany is a polarizing main character. Andy Reid is the dad.

name: Travis Kelce
bio: Future Hall of Fame tight end. Three Super Bowl rings. Co-hosts the New Heights podcast with brother Jason. Partner: Taylor Swift.
drama: Dating Taylor Swift is the cultural moment of the decade. The Eras Tour cameos broke the internet.

name: Josh Allen
bio: MVP of the 2024 season. The avatar of the heartbreak Bills Mafia franchise. 6'5, 240. Throws fastballs. Dating Hailee Steinfeld.
drama: Always loses to Mahomes in January. The 13-second collapse will haunt him forever.

name: Jalen Hurts
bio: Super Bowl-winning QB. Famously calm. Famously private. The Tush Push is unstoppable.
drama: Quietly took over the Eagles from a more famous QB (Wentz). The Saquon Barkley signing made the offense lethal.

name: Joe Burrow
bio: Bengals QB. Mint Cartiers. Black turtleneck. Walks like he's in a Fendi ad. Olivia Holzmacher partner.
drama: He could be in a Vogue editorial. He just is. Injuries keep biting him.

name: Lamar Jackson
bio: Two-time MVP. Most dynamic QB ever to play the position. Negotiated his own contract. Mom is his agent.
drama: The Ravens have never figured out how to make him happy in January.

name: Tyreek Hill
bio: The Cheetah. Fastest man in the league. Dolphins WR1.
drama: Off-field history is long. The Miami arrest video right before the season opener was a moment.

name: Justin Jefferson
bio: Best WR in football. The Griddy belongs to him. Highest-paid non-QB in NFL history.
drama: Stuck on the Vikings, who can't find him a competent QB. McCarthy era should fix that.

name: Saquon Barkley
bio: RB1 of the Eagles. Made the Giants regret everything. Won a Super Bowl in his first Eagles year.
drama: The Giants letting him walk to a division rival is one of the great franchise gaffes of the decade.

name: Caleb Williams
bio: USC's Heisman winner, #1 pick. Painted nails. Cried with his dad on draft night. Bears' messiah.
drama: The Bears got him a real OC (Ben Johnson). Year 2 is the year.

name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander
bio: Reigning MVP. The face of the Thunder. Cousin of Nickeil Alexander-Walker. Tailored cardigans postgame.
drama: Quietly the most-respected player in the league. No drama. Just buckets and immaculate fits. Chuck Bass energy.

name: Nikola Jokic
bio: Three-time MVP. Greatest passing big man ever. Loves horses more than basketball. Wins championships and goes home.
drama: None. He just wants to go to the horses. The most calm superstar in any sport.

name: Kevin Durant
bio: Two-time Champion. Two-time Finals MVP. Most skilled scorer in NBA history. Now in Houston after the Phoenix trade.
drama: @gethigher77 burner saga. Famously thin-skinned on Twitter. Beefed with Booker, Frank Vogel, Jabari Smith. Dan Humphrey of the NBA — talented outsider running an anonymous blog.

name: LeBron James
bio: The King. Four-time Champion. Career scoring leader. Plays alongside his son Bronny.
drama: The whole Lakers org bends to his calendar. The Klutch agency runs the franchise. He'll retire when he's good and ready.

name: Victor Wembanyama
bio: 7'4 unicorn. Defensive Player of the Year favorite. Plays like LeBron and Dirk had a child raised by Pop.
drama: He's just nice. Pop protects him. The sport's future.

name: Anthony Edwards
bio: Wolves' face. Most marketable player under 25. Bring it Sportscenter. His 'I'm the best' interview was a moment.
drama: He's the heir apparent. The next face of the league when LeBron goes.

name: Jayson Tatum
bio: Celtics' star. NBA Champion. The first overall pick of his draft class to win a ring.
drama: Took six years and a co-star (Jaylen Brown) to get the ring. Critics still whisper about him. Calm in spite of it.

name: Luka Doncic
bio: Generational scorer. Was the Mavs' face. Got traded to the Lakers in the most shocking deal in modern NBA history.
drama: The Luka trade broke the league. Mavs fans haven't recovered. Now the Lakers are his team.

name: Stephen Curry
bio: Four-time Champion. Greatest shooter ever. Changed basketball.
drama: None. Wife Ayesha runs a media empire. Sonya and Dell saga is its own subplot.

name: Cade Cunningham
bio: All-Star. The Pistons' messiah. Big-bodied playmaker.
drama: He's the reason the Pistons became Jacob Palmer instead of Cal Weaver. Detroit, but make it sexy.
